name: Chinese Chicken-Stuffed Peppers
recipeIngredient: 1 Cup Finely chopped cooked chicken breast (skinned before cooking)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut a 1/2-inch thick slice from the side of each pepper, reserving slices; remove seeds.
2. Place peppers in boiling water and boil for 5 minutes. Drain and set aside.
3. Coat a large skillet or wok with Pam cooking spray. Add sesame oil and place over medium heat until hot.
4. Add garlic and gingerroot; stir fry for 30 seconds.
5. Add carrots and green onions; stir fry for 2 more minutes.
6. Remove from heat, then add chicken and remaining ingredients. Stir well to combine.
7. Spoon about 3/4 cup of the mixture into each reserved pepper.
8. Top with reserved pepper slices.
9. Arrange peppers, cut side up, in a 10x6x2-inch baking dish. Cover and bake at 350°F for 30 minutes or until thoroughly heated.
